nodes.label: Unit 8: Books
nodes.description: The joy of reading books and understanding articles

nodes.label: Books (Poem)
nodes.description: A poem celebrating the magic and wonder of reading books

nodes.label: Theme: Love for Books
nodes.description: Books are our best friends and greatest treasures

nodes.label: Imagination & Travel
nodes.description: Books take us to faraway lands without leaving our chair

nodes.label: Message: Read More!
nodes.description: Children should develop the habit of reading every day

nodes.label: Going to Buy a Book
nodes.description: A story about a child's exciting visit to a bookshop

nodes.label: At the Bookshop
nodes.description: Many types of books: stories, pictures, science, fairy tales

nodes.label: Choosing a Book
nodes.description: The joy of selecting a book of your own choice

nodes.label: Valuing Books
nodes.description: Taking care of books and treating them like treasures

nodes.label: Grammar: Articles
nodes.description: Learning to use a, an, and the correctly

nodes.label: 'A' and 'An'
nodes.description: 'A' before consonant sounds, 'An' before vowel sounds

nodes.label: 'The'
nodes.description: Used for specific things that we already know about

nodes.label: Sound Rule
nodes.description: Articles depend on the sound, not the spelling of the next word

nodes.label: Examples
nodes.description: a book, an apple, the sun, an hour, a university
